title: Second Chance
description: Prevents one-shot deaths for players and pets when near full health.
body:
Second Chance makes a small change to player and pet health, which prevents one shots if the player/pet is close to full health. This prevents unfair one-shots and gives time to react to powerful enemies.

This will not apply to fall damage, falling blocks, void damage, or players attacking pets.

You can edit the Second Chance threshold in second-chance.properties and second_chance_config.json.

Forge version found here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/second-chance-forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/second-chance-forge)

Thank you Shock Micro for making the mod icon.

Zoey's Discord: https://discord.gg/Pk9BNxjpp2
